headline: McDonald’s Viral Moments Test How Cultural Buzz Supports NYSE MCD Story
summary: McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski’s on-camera tasting of the new Big Arch burger has gone viral, triggering social media debate, memes, and responses from rival chains. The KPop Demon Hunters meal tie in has sparked strong demand for limited run collectibles, with some items already being flipped on secondary markets. Ticker: NYSE:MCD, recent data show a last close of $305.68, with a 3 year return of 13.4% and a 5 year return of 46.9%. For investors watching NYSE:MCD, these pop culture...
